## Problem

Describe the user or operator problem.

## Change

Describe the implementation or documentation change.

## Trust Boundary

State whether authorization, execution, persistence, retrieval, or tenant
isolation changes.

## Evidence

- [ ] Tests or mechanical validation added
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] ADR added or updated when required
- [ ] Rollback behavior documented
- [ ] `make validate` passes
- [ ] No credentials, private paths, or production data included
